meta.title: Watch SpaceX launch NASA's Crew-11 to the ISS!
meta.description:
[TIME SUBJECT TO CHANGE] 

NASA's Crew-11 mission is launching on SpaceX's Falcon 9 and Crew Dragon Endeavor from LC-39A in Kennedy Space Center, Florida. The crew features NASA rookies Zena Cardman and veteran Mike Fincke, alongside JAXA's Kimiya Yui and Roscosmos' Oleg Platonov. Lift off it scheduled for 12:09 p.m. Eastern [16:09 UTC].

00:00 - Intro / Prelaunch Preview
06:45 - Q&A
14:45 - Crew Access Arm 
24:00 - Prop Load
54:30 - Strongback Retract
57:55 - Go For Launch / T-1 minute
58:50 - Liftoff!
1:01:25 - Stage Sep
1:05:50 - Booster Landing
1:07:50 - SECO
1:08:35 - Dragon Sep
1:14:50 - Q&A


Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check it out anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) by searching Everyday Astronaut
